items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

***We are still seeking the roles below for our Storyhive short. Please submit ASAP!* **

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

items.text:
Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

1. Matylda Osińska (26) – typ „twardej babki”. 

Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Księgowa (28) – księgowa w firmie budowlanej; drobna, życzliwa.

Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3.Matka Amelii (34) – spokojna, opanowana, ale bardzo boi się o córkę. Ładna, subtelny makijaż i ubranie.

Data: 11. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto

4.Anka – Anna Sitowska (37) – żona ganstera, matka Klary. Zrobiona. Na początku związku była delikatna, przerażało ją to, czym zajmuje się mąż. Potem jednak się „zradykalizowała”. Potrafi być stanowcza i ostra, zwłaszcza, jeśli chodzi o jej rodzinę. Ubrana elegancko, w perły i drogi zegarek.

Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
‼️UWAGA ŚLĄSK – Katowice i okolice‼️
🔥Gramy nowy serial kryminalny🔥
  
Szanowni Państwo, serdecznie zapraszamy na plan filmowy. Realizujemy nowy serial dla jednej z ogólnopolskich stacji telewizyjnych!! To nie będzie paradokument, lecz śląska wersja ogólnopolskiego hitu, który ma miliony widzów! Obecnie poszukujemy:

💥GOŚCIE KNAJPY (20-60 l.) – poszukujemy w różnym typie 😉
Data: 03.06 / środa - 1 scena 
Stawka: 150 zł 
/ na plan zapraszamy większą liczbę wykonawców /

💥ZBIR 1 & ZBIR 2 (24-50 l.) – Zapraszamy Panów o stosownej aparycji 😉 
Data: 04.06 / czwartek - 1 scena (pełna akcji scena „napadania i zatrzymania”, grana z główną obsadą ) 
Stawka: 300 zł 

💥OCHRONIARZ 1 & OCHRONIARZ 2 (30-55 l.) – poszukujemy w różnym typie.
Data: 26.06 / wtorek - 1 scena (pełna akcji scena „napadania i zatrzymania”, grana z główną obsadą ) 
Stawka: 300 zł 

💥UCZENNICA 1  &  UCZENNICA 2 (16-24 l.) – Poszukiwane wykonawczynie z zacięciem aktorskim (duża szansa)
Data: 28.06 / piątek  (bardzo efektowne sceny akcji, grane z główną obsadą i dużym rozmachem!) 
Stawka: 400 zł 

💲Stawki netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie💲
(Wypełniamy umowę o dzieło)

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com
W tytule prosimy wpisać nazwę roli, do której wysyłamy zgłoszenie, np. "ZBIR"

📩Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy :)   

Super przygoda na planie, zdjęcia na pamiątkę i możliwość poznania znanych aktorów 😊 – Serdecznie zapraszamy!

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do danej roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" i lokacja są podawane dzień wcześniej. (Oczywiście, wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).
PS: Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

* **Pracownicy ochrony (Kobiety i Mężczyźni):** elegancki wygląd, styl biurowy / smart casual. Panowie ogoleni lub z zadbanym zarostem, panie w makijażu.
* **Wartownicy (Mężczyźni):** postawni, dobrze zbudowani panowie.

💰 **Stawka:** 210 zł brutto (płatne przelewem) 📅 **Termin:** 25.05 (pon) i/lub 26.05 (wt)

📩 **ZGŁOSZENIA (Wiadomość prywatna):** Proszę przesłać aktualne zdjęcia (**twarz + cała sylwetka**), numer telefonu.

sharedPost.text:
📣 Mein Gesangs-Workshop geht in die nächste Runde! 🎶

In 4 intensiven Stunden arbeiten wir gemeinsam an:
🎤 Körperhaltung & Atmung
🎵 Stimm-Sound & Klangentfaltung
💪 Belten & Stimmkraft
🎶 Erweiterung des Stimmumfangs

Für alle Levels – Anfänger:innen genauso willkommen wie Fortgeschrittene! 🙌

Die Gruppe ist bewusst klein gehalten – max. 5 Personen – damit genug Raum für individuelle Arbeit und persönliches Feedback bleibt.

✨ Bonus bei Buchung: Ein zusätzliches 45-minütiges Einzelcoaching mit mir – als separater Termin ganz nach deinem Wunsch!

☕ Frisch gemahlener Kaffee & selbst gebackener Kuchen erwarten dich im charmanten Loft-Studio in Berlin Mitte.

📍 Anklamer Str. 38, 10115 Berlin-Mitte

Zwei Termine zur Auswahl:
🗓️ Sa., 25. Juli 2026 | 14–18 Uhr
🗓️ Sa., 26. September 2026 | 14–18 Uhr

🎟️ Kosten: 240 € | Max. 5 Personen

👉 Den Anmeldelink findest du unter Linktree in der Bio oder direkt unter:
www.singasong-behappy.de/gesangsworkshop

Ich freue mich auf dich!
Sing A Song – Be Happy! 🎶
Deine Bernadette 😊

#gesangsworkshop #workshop #singen #gesang #stimmbildung

Places & People: Burcu and Turkish Hospitality 1 - KarrideoTV https://youtu.be/rSky6aV76DM 

Burcu in Faralya is the beginning of a special KarrideoTV travel series about hospitality, nature, craftsmanship and the story behind the Soap Lady. 

In this first part of Places & People, I, Christian Weiße, meet host Burcu on her property in Faralya. Many people know Burcu as the Soap Lady, but behind this name there is much more than just a beautiful travel image. 

This video is not a classic hotel tour and not a superficial travel recommendation. It is a calm travel dialogue about a special place, a special woman and a world created from nature, family, soap craftsmanship, art and genuine hospitality. 

Faralya is located above Ölüdeniz and combines Mediterranean landscapes, peace, views and proximity to the Lycian Way. This is exactly where the atmosphere is created that Burcu’s guests describe again and again: personal, warm, slow-paced and full of details. 

In Part 1, the first glimpse opens onto Burcu, her energy and the place where Soap Lady Cottage, Daisy Suite and Lion Suite become a small Mediterranean world of experience. 

This video is part of the KarrideoTV playlist “TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure”. 

Subscribe, like, share and comment to follow the full series. 

Which encounter while traveling has ever shown you that a place becomes truly special because of the person behind it? 

Links and resources: 

Soap Lady & More: https://soapladyoludeniz.com/

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — LEAD ROLE**

We are casting **LOGAN**, the lead role in the independent feature film **AFTERGLOW**.

**Shoot Dates:** August 13–23
**Filming Days:** Approx. 5–6 days
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA
**Pay:** Deferred pay with contract
**Includes:** IMDb credit, meals, footage

—

**Working Title:** *Afterglow*
**Genre:** Thriller / Drama

**Logline:**
After a party ends in a girl’s disappearance, a closeted teen is torn between the boy he never got over and the girl who helped him set the night in motion.

—

**ROLE: LOGAN — Lead**
**Age Range:** 18–25 to play 18
**Race/Ethnicity:** Open
**Height:** 5’10”–6’2” preferred
**Body Type:** Lean / athletic preferred

Logan is seen as the natural leader of his friend group: magnetic, eccentric, likable, and effortlessly charming without trying. He makes friends easily and draws people in, but beneath that charm, he is quietly unraveling.

Secretly struggling with his sexuality in an environment where vulnerability feels dangerous, Logan is caught between desire, repression, guilt, and the pressure of becoming an adult. He is emotionally guarded, impulsive, reactive, and occasionally self-destructive.

**Seeking LGBTQ+ actors strongly preferred.**

**Important Notes:**
This role requires strong emotional range, vulnerability, and intense chemistry with the actor playing Jason. Chemistry with Jason is essential to the story.

This role **includes intimacy**. All intimacy will be handled professionally, with clear communication, boundaries, and appropriate production protocols.

—

**To Submit:**
Please send your headshot, resume, reel, and availability to:

**[info@afterglowthefilm.com](mailto:info@afterglowthefilm.com)**

topComments.text: I would’ve loved this role but I’m older than what your looking for

items.text:
Hi everyone!

We are looking for extras for a nightclub scene in Beverly Hills for our independent series **COLD CITY**.

We need men and women, ages 21–45, all ethnicities are welcome.

**Date:** Thursday, May 28
**Call time:** 10:00 AM
**Location:** Beverly Hills
**Outfit:** Nightclub / going-out look, something you would wear to a nice club in Beverly Hills.

This is a small independent production, so we can offer a **$20 gas fee**, food on set, and a chance to be part of our series, meet great people, and have a fun filming experience.

If you’re interested and available, please send me a private message for all the details.

Thank you so much, and have a great day!

Allround-TV geht völlig neue Wege mit Auftrags-Video-Produktionen in virtueller Umgebung. Wir erstellen komplette virtuelle Studios nach Ihren Vorgaben, setzen den Moderator, die Moderatorin via GreenScreen in die virtuelle 3D Umgebung, animieren die Szene mit Tracking-Kameras in Echtzeit und schalten Studiogäste, Interviewpartner, Experten auf Wunsch weltweit via Live-Stream zu. Eine fantastische Möglichkeit, Ihren Video-Content technisch auf der Höhe der Zeit zu erstellen. Ab sofort möglich im eigenen professionellen Video-Studio von Allround-TV in Altötting. Wir setzen Sie in Szene!

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – GŁÓWNA ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat **uzdolnionego wokalnie (najchętniej śpiew ludowy, choć niekoniecznie).

Zdjęcia planowane na rok 2027, w tej chwili rozpoczynamy castingi.

** **

 

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube, krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą oraz nagranie śpiewu chłopca (również jako link do You Tube).

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **WBG**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka. Bez osób towarzyszących na zdjęciu.

items.text:
I have seen plenty of posts on here asking about social media and how it can affect casting opportunities. So we three actor-content creators have banded together to create Social Media classes for actors that want to grow their followings and learn how to make good content that can help their potential. 

Right now, we have one public seminar (first Saturday of the month) alongside unlimited 1-to-1 coaching. Come check us out if you would like to join us for some advice or leave questions below and I am happy to answer 😁 

www.actsocmed.com

items.text:
Hi all. My daughter has just finished at a top drama school, but i have to admit, im extremely disappointed with how its all finished. 
They had an end of year performance, but no talk from the head, or any faculty member actually.. There was no assistance of what to do next, no advice on how to secure an agent, a list of agencies etc. No headshot day. No agency day. I just feel like its all finished and there has been no 'ending' as such. Is this normal? I dont want to name the school. 

My daughter is just now feeling very lost. Its obviously too late now to consider unis etc, so shes going to take a year out and work.
items.title: Welcome to Actors & Writers London

topComments.text:
Drama  schools   don't do showcase for foundation course students  (only for BA professional acting  and MFA etc) as they are not considered industry ready.  You said end of year so I'm presuming that she has done  a foundation course? Those students are expected  to audition for a degree course but it's really hard to get a degree course place.   They usually only  take  maybe 1 or 2 from  their foundation courses. 
Taking a year to consolidate that learning and doing some amateur acting and auditioning  for open calls along with getting skills for whatever she is going to do to earn money between acting jobs, plus  prepping and applying early  for a degree course is probs a productive use of her time.

Did it not arrange an end-of-course actors’ showcase in front of an audience? Doesn’t she not already have headshots for her Spotlight entry?

In any case she needs to network - she can go to Equity and I would suggest she sign up for one of the new writing/acting groups for a low cost annual fee like Actors & Writers London 
https://www.actorsandwriters.london/
https://www.playerplaywrights.co.uk/
London Comedy Writers 
(Which is free)
https://www.londoncomedywriters.com/
North London Actors
https://www.northlondonactors.co.uk/

With these she can mix with experienced actors, some of whom will be agented, & start to make contacts. If she is under 30 she can also join Masterclass https://www.masterclass.org.uk/

She really now has to network, meet industry professionals & create her own opportunities.

If she can sing & dance, she can contact local theatres - she may get professional paid roles in pantomimes or other variety performances. Also hotel cabarets, holiday camps. She has to research as much as possible, create her own opportunities, join up with others, do profitshare productions, send her CV & headshots to the National Film & Television School for student directors to see. She has to start to be proactive & find out what is out there. It’s a tough profession & even some of the most talented actors find it hard to find agents & jobs.

items.text:
BRAND NEW DRAG-LIPSYNC MUSICAL COMING TO SHEFFIELD 2027!

We are looking for a Male South Yorkshire based actor (18+) for our brand new show ‘Wig-Or-Mortis’ a drag-lipsync musical, never seen and never done before. 

The show will be premiering at Crookes Social Club on March 20th 2027 with a potential for other shows at other venues.

The role is UNPAID however travel costs can be discussed, distance dependent. The role requires acting and also dancing (neither are essential).

Get to work in a super fun environment with likeminded actors and constant collaboration.

Please fill out the form below to register interest or email tmcdonnell800@gmail.com for further information.

items.text:
Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Gangster 2 (20-25) – masywny.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Gangster 1 (30-40) – masywny.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Daniel (31) – Normalny typ, ma żonę, dziecko. Przeciętnej postury, w okularach. 
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Dłużnik (32) – ćpun, szczupły. 
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

5. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

6. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, któremu zlecono pobicie; umięśniony, typ ulicznego dresa. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

8. Ojciec Amelii (37) – emocjonalny, wybuchowy. Bardzo kocha córkę i dla niej by nawet zabił. Wysoki, szczupły.
Daty: 10. i 11. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9. Luka – Łukasz Sitowski (42) – szef szajki, od lat prowadzi różne nielegalne interesy: handel narkotykami, zastraszenia, haracze. Równolegle ma rodzinę i żyje „normalnie”. Średniego wzrostu, dość przysadzisty. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – bojaźliwy, w dobrej kondycji.  
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

11. Mirek Osiński (52) – napadnięty mężczyzna; postawny, odważny, w dobrej kondycji. 
Daty: 11. i 13. czerwca 
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

12. Sebastian Stańczuk (58) – szef firmy budowlanej; krępy, łysiejący.  
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

6. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, któremu zlecono pobicie; umięśniony, typ ulicznego dresa. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

8. Ojciec Amelii (37) – emocjonalny, wybuchowy. Bardzo kocha córkę i dla niej by nawet zabił. Wysoki, szczupły.
Daty: 10. i 11. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9. Luka – Łukasz Sitowski (42) – szef szajki, od lat prowadzi różne nielegalne interesy: handel narkotykami, zastraszenia, haracze. Równolegle ma rodzinę i żyje „normalnie”. Średniego wzrostu, dość przysadzisty. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – bojaźliwy, w dobrej kondycji.  
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

11. Mirek Osiński (52) – napadnięty mężczyzna; postawny, odważny, w dobrej kondycji. 
Daty: 11. i 13. czerwca 
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

12. Sebastian Stańczuk (58) – szef firmy budowlanej; krępy, łysiejący.  
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto

items.title: Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

items.text:
hej,

SZUKAM MUZYKÓW I WOKALISTÓW DO REKLAMY. 

Zapraszam na casting do reklamy napoju jest otwarty na osoby różnorodne, wyraziste, charakterystyczne, choć jak zawsze, klasyczna uroda też będzie mile widziana :)

Szukamy następujących osób:

** MUZYCY - EPIZODY z wizerunkiem** - 4 x osoby z bandu: **perkusja / bas / gitara + wokal.** Osoby, które realnie grają na tych instrumentach. Możemy szukać zarówno kobiet jak i mężczyzn. Mocna energia, luz, wyrazistość. **SUPER JAKBY SIĘ ZNALAZŁ ZESPÓŁ**

 

**STAWKI I PRAWA**

Rola główna:

2 x 1500 PLN (dniówka) + 4000 PLN (prawa) + 20% agencji

Epizody - zarówno współlokatorzy, jak i muzycy w tle:

6 x 1500 PLN (dniówka) + 2500 PLN (prawa) + 20% agencji

Statyści z wizerunkiem:

4 x 1200 PLN (dniówka + prawa) + 20% agencji

**1 dzień zdjęciowy. **

video - 2 x 15’’ & skróty 2 x 6’’ oraz skróty i przeformatowania oraz wersje montażowe (w tym możliwe wersje z różnymi planszami końcowymi), wykorzystanie klatek z video w formie stilli promocyjnych

**PRAWA:**  3 miesiące

video - Wielka Brytania, full Online & full Digital

bezterminowa archiwizacja bez aktywnego promowania na kanałach Klienta
archiwizacja i możliwość wykorzystywania fragmentów (w tym wersji reżyserskiej) w portfolio współtwórców reklamy jako forma promocji własnych osiągnięć artystycznych, eventy i konkursy branżowe

**TERMINY** 

Termin nadsyłania selftape: 01.06 do godziny 14:00

8.06 - recall

10.06 - wybory aktorskie 

12.06 - przymiarki 

16.06 - shoot 

Na maile czekam pod adresem [slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:slvic.squad.cast@gmail.com) 

W tytule maila proszę wpisywać Imię i nazwisko + Muzyk 

W treści : 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Numer telefonu 
4. 2-3 aktualne zdjęcia 
5. Informacje na jakim grasz instrumencie lecz czy śpiewasz. 
6. Mile widziane zgłoszenia całych zespołów

items.text:

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

Based in Southern California

items.text:
**KEY GRIP + GRIP TRUCK NEEDED — SHORT FILM (JUNE 18–20)** 

Hey gang! We’re currently looking for an experienced **Key Grip with a Grip Truck** for an upcoming **short film production** shooting **June 18th–20th**.

This project is **SHALOM SALAM: A RECIPE FOR PEACE** — a powerful and uplifting film about connection, humanity, and bridging divides through culture and community.

I’m incredibly proud to be part of this project alongside award-winning filmmakers **Bayou Bennett** and **Daniel Lir** of Dream Team Directors — a directing duo with **80+ international film awards** and over **16 years** of creating visually stunning, emotionally impactful films centered around humanity and connection.

 **Shalom Salam** tells the story of an Israeli and Palestinian entrepreneur who come together through food, technology, and community to inspire peace in a divided world.

 **Project Info:**
https://seedandspark.com/fund/shalom-salam-a-recipe-for-peace#story

**PROJECT DETAILS**
**Position:** Key Grip + Grip Truck
**Shoot Dates:** **June 18–20**
**Project Type:** Short Film
**Rate:** **$800–$900 Per Day** (depending on package/availability)
**Location:** Washington State
**Status:** Non-Union 

We’re looking for someone dependable, collaborative, and comfortable working on an indie narrative set. Grip truck package details and previous work/reel are appreciated when reaching out.

If interested, please send:
• Your experience/resume
• Grip truck package details
• Availability for the shoot dates
• Contact info

 **Contact:**
Henry Galliett
henrygalliett@gmail.com
425-623-5677

Please share with anyone who may be a good fit!

THOUSAND CONVERSATIONS. ONE MEAL AT A TIME. STARRING DAN SHAKED AVALON GREENBERG CALL FARAH MARWAN BAYOU NOLANBUSHNELL NOLAN DIRECTEDB AND DANIEL LIR DREAM TEAM DIRECTORS WRITTENBY DANIEL LIR FARIBA KALANTARI CD- PRODUCERS NIGERLAMBEY FRASER SCOTT CINEMATOGRAPHER PRODUCTIONDESICNER BYRON WERNER HUNTER MCCANN'

items.text:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.

items.text:
Reposting this so that everyone gets a chance to audition

DEADLINE: June 5th, 2026

CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting last two weekends of September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th)

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

WHO I'M LOOKING FOR:

XANDER, Male, 30s-40s The dad. Big presence, quiet intensity, carries a lot of weight he doesn't talk about. This is a physical role but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time, I want to meet you. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA , Female, 12-15 Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, open to the right person.

LORELEI , Female, 30s Xander's wife. She's got a prosthetic leg, wears a tool belt, and looks like someone who's kept a family alive through sheer will. Small role but she needs to feel real the second she's on screen. Open to everyone.

LILITH , Female, around 7 The little sister. She's got one line and a stuffed rabbit with one eye and she will absolutely steal the scene. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

YOUNG XANDER , Male, 8-11 A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

HELENE & ANORRA , Female, 8-12 each Two girls in the same flashback. They're ahead of Young Xander, picking through debris. Small roles but they help build the world. Open to all.

JACKSON , Male, 50s A farmer and trader who refuses to break even when things get very bad. He's got maybe five minutes of screen time and needs to make you feel everything. Open to all.

ELLEN (Jackson's Wife) , Female, 30s-40s Non-speaking. She died trying to protect her kid. The image says everything. You need to be comfortable with fake blood and staged death. Open to all.

JACKSON'S CHILDREN (x3) , Under 12 Also non-speaking. Same situation, this is heavy material and parents need to know that going in. Open to all.

BIONIC , Male, late 20s-40s The villain. Cybernetic arm, artificial eye, zero mercy. This role needs a separate prosthetic fitting before we shoot, plan for an extra session. If you want to play a genuinely scary person, this is your role. Open to all.

RAZOR , Male, late 20s-40s Bionic's partner and honestly the more terrifying of the two. Full metallic skull prosthetic, razor teeth, moves like something that used to be human. Full face appliance means a fitting session and extra time in the chair on shoot days. If you can commit to that and move like an animal, I want to talk. Open to all.

EXTRAS / BACKGROUND , Various ages Farmers, survivors, colony members. If you just want to be part of it, reach out. Open to all.

Heads up: This film has staged violence, fake blood, and some genuinely dark dramatic moments. Nothing unsafe happens on set, ever, but you should know what you're signing up for. For anyone under 18, a parent or guardian must be on set for the entire time; there are no exceptions.

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]

Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. Experience helps, but it's not what I'm looking for first. A reel is welcome if you have one.

topComments.text:
Interested.. sent you an Email. 
Thanks, 
Sam

items.text:
Hello all!

 

One of our actors had to leave our production due to recent health complications. We are currently looking for someone to replace the characters of Egeus/Philostrate. This role will be double cast as it's relatively small scene wise (roughly only in 2.5 scenes)

 

No specific gender or race requirements; would prefer a taller actor 5'8+ but not a dealbreaker if this doesn't apply. This is a community theatre volunteer role; actors and crew are NOT paid.

 

Location: Virginia Highlands, ATL 30306

 

**Current remaining rehearsal schedule **

**-T/Th 7-10pm**

**-Sat 10am-2pm**

**-Wed 6/3  7-10pm**

**-Fri 6/5 6-9pm**

 

**TECH **

**6/6-6/10 (NO Sunday rehearsal)**

 

**SHOWS **

**6/11-6/20**

**Thurs-Sat @8pm**

**Sun & 6/20 @2pm**

 

If interested or know someone who may be a good fit, please email our director/producer at the following

 

Info Renegade Theatre Co. <[info@renegadetheatreco.org](mailto:info@renegadetheatreco.org)>

 

Renegade Theatre <[renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com](mailto:renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com)>

items.text:
Headshots that help casting imagine you in the role.

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

Most of my sessions are shot indoors in a more controlled and comfortable environment, whatever the weather decides to do outside.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.text:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

items.text:
“Bo” CASTING CALL – Proof of Concept Short Film (Austin, TX)
We are seeking a young Asian actress (ages 8–10) and a medium-sized dog for a proof-of-concept shoot for Bo, an upcoming short film currently in development.

My name is Rachel Villagomez, director of Bo, and I will be collaborating with cinematographer Carlos Roberto Nevarez to film a scene from the script as part of the project’s development process.

Logline:

A quiet young girl must find her voice and inner strength to save her beloved dog while adjusting to life on her estranged father’s rural Texas farm, thousands of miles away from the home she left behind.

ROLE: ANIKA

* Female, ages 8–10

* Asian or mixed Asian heritage

* Quiet, thoughtful, and adventurous

* Bilingual (Optional but heavily recommended)

Actors who can speak Thai, Lao, Mandarin, Japanese, or Korean (or another Asian language that reflects their background) are heavily encouraged to apply. Ideally, we would love commit to an actress who may also be interested in participating in a future production of the full short film.

Shoot Dates

June 20–21, 2026

Bear Creek area, Austin, Texas

Compensation

This is a low-budget proof-of-concept production. While funding is limited, meals will be provided and participants will receive footage for their reels/portfolios. Bonus-eligible upon grant reception. 

This is a great opportunity for non actors/beginner actors who want to break into screen acting. 

To submit, please email rmvillagomez3@gmail.com 

headshots/photos, any relevant experience, and availability.

sharedPost.text:
🎤 Belting Workshop – klug laut singen
Ein anatomisch klares und zugleich praktisches Verständnis der lauten Stimmproduktion im Stil von Ethel Merman. ✨

Viele Strukturen der Stimmproduktion lassen sich bewusst steuern, um intensive Klanggebung mit möglichst wenig stimmlichem Aufwand zu erzeugen. Gemeinsam haben wir diese Prozesse besprochen, visuell und akustisch erforscht 👂🫁 und direkt in Übungen sowie Songs angewendet 🎶

Danke für eure Offenheit, eure Neugier und die gemeinsame stimmliche Arbeit 💛
Ich wünsche euch viel Freude mit den neuen Impulsen und weiterhin kraftvolles, gesundes Singen. Bis bald! 🎭🎵

items.text:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

KarrideoTV ist dein deutschsprachiges Magazin für Persönlichkeitsentwicklung, Business, Gesellschaft und wahre Geschichten. Wir bringen dir journalistische Reportagen, Interviews, Expertenwissen, Dokumentationen und Mindset-Impulse – für Menschen, die mehr aus ihrem Leben machen wollen.

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

🎙️ KARRIDEO TV – Mindset • Business • Stories 

KarrideoTV ist dein deutschsprachiges Magazin für Persönlichkeitsentwicklung, Business, Gesellschaft und wahre Geschichten. Wir bringen dir journalistische Reportagen, Interviews, Expertenwissen, Dokumentationen und Mindset-Impulse – für Menschen, die mehr aus ihrem Leben machen wollen.

https://www.youtube.com/@KarrideoTV

🏗️ Ekipa kompletna? Brakuje tylko Ciebie! Trwa casting do reklamy marketu budowlanego! 🏗️

! NOWY CASTING ! SUPER PRZYGODA !

Do najnowszej reklamy znanego marketu budowlanego poszukujemy:

Mężczyzna

Wiek ok. 40-45 lat. Zadbany, dobrze wyglądający mężczyzna o łagodnym, ale stanowczym i budzącym zaufanie wyglądzie. Uroda klasyczna, z zarostem: krótsza broda lub wąsy. Włosy ciemne, dłuższe, klasyczna, ale nowoczesna fryzura. Twarz i mimika na tyle elastyczne, aby pasowały do kilku różnych ról i emocji.

Must have: nienaganna wymowa i dykcja.

Kobieta

Wiek ok. 45-50 lat. Raczej zwykła z urody, mieszkanka większego miasta. Uroda klasyczna, naturalna, zapadająca w pamięć, taka „do polubienia”. Włosy długie lub średniej długości, kolor raczej blond, ciemny blond, brąz, klasyczna fryzura z możliwym upięciem. Twarz i mimika na tyle elastyczne, aby pasowały do kilku różnych ról i emocji. Pogodna, uśmiechnięta, budząca zaufanie, „dziewczyna z sąsiedztwa”.

Must have: nienaganna wymowa i dykcja.

STAWKI:

Od 3 000 zł!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

Wizytówka + scenki 

TIMING:

31.05 — termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń do godz. 18
03.06 — recall
12.06 — przymiarki
15.06 — zdjęcia w Warszawie

 
ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenek proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 
 
Tytuł: 062

Link do castingu i opis scenek:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting062/

Zrób pierwszy krok i pokaż się przed kamerą! Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.title: Hi everyone

sharedPost.text:
Most actor training takes time to reveal your habits.

Months. Sometimes years.
Scene after scene. Character after character.
Before you start to notice… “oh, I do that every time.”

Meisner flips that.

By stripping away text early on, we get straight to behaviour.
Straight to instinct. Straight to you.

Which means something very useful happens very quickly:
We can see the difference between a character choice
and your personal habits sneaking into everything.

And once you can see it… you can do something about it.

Not eventually. Not after ten more scenes.
Now. In the room. Within weeks.

It’s efficient.
It’s direct.
It’s a little exposing.

And when this work is led by a deeply experienced, rigorously trained practitioner…
that’s where Meisner becomes something else entirely.

Precise. Penetrative. Transformative.

On the other side of that?

More freedom. More range. More of you available to the work.

Try it for yourself. Meisner 1 is available to book — www.bodymindvoice.co.uk

Training that rewires you from the inside out.

#meisnerlondon #actortraininglondon #londonactingclass #londonactor #actorslife🎬

items.text:
Looking for a filming location around Los Angeles for upcoming NYFA MFA Producing short film projects.

Does anyone have access to either:

• A therapist office that could be used for a one-day shoot

OR preferably

• A house with a home office that could double as a therapist office, along with a living room, kitchen, bedroom, and some type of patio/backyard area.

Ideally looking for a location available for 3 filming days in a row so I can shoot multiple projects the same week:
• Bad at Love
• Love Bots
• Love

(Yes, there is definitely a theme there.)

I should have pitch packet materials available soon, but finding the location first is important so I know which project to focus on for my class production. Only one film is for class, but I am trying to complete multiple projects around the same timeframe. If everything can be filmed together, my school will be able to cover the location insurance.

Please message me if you know of a possible location or someone who might be interested. Thank you!

- LuvLeighAn Clark

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Maayan, I’m a Los Angeles-based actress and a graduate of the Acting for Camera AOS program at AMDA.

I’m currently looking to connect with filmmakers, student directors, photographers, and creatives for upcoming projects, short films, and collaborations.

I’m bilingual (Hebrew/English), comfortable with both dramatic and comedic material, and always excited to work on meaningful and visually interesting projects.

Headshots/reel available upon request — would love to connect!

items.text: Hi! I'm new to this group. I recently joined because I’ve been an extra for casting collective and have been in a few productions. I’d love to get into set design. I’m a maker of large marquees and bespoke canvas structures. I feel these skills would be great when setting up sets for films.

items.text:
Hi everyone!
Im currently finalising casting for a vertical drama series taking place 2-4th June in London.

2nd&3rd will be in Croydon

4th will be in Potters Bar

Still looking for the following roles to be filled:

•6x masked bidders- 3rd June - half day £50

•1x female approx 40-50 to play Dorothy. 2nd&4th half day £50. 3rd full day £100. American accent required 

•1x female approx 40-50 to play ‘mum’-4th June half day £50

Please DM me if available and state which role for with headshots :)

items.text:
🚨!!CASTING CALL!!🚨
🚨!!CASTING NOTICE!!🚨

Hello! My name is Reve Hriczko. I'm an independent filmmaker with my own independent film studio called Two Fold Films. We are currently casting for our upcoming 2028 horror film titled "Camp Red Lake." Below I've attached posters detailing all information you could possibly need for your audition as well as the audition form! Filming will be between May-August of 2027 in the Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania. This is not paid work!! I'm very excited to work more on this project as it's been in the works for 2 years already.

Please share and audition! Feel free to reach out with any questions or concerns. You may dm me, comment on this post, or email Twofoldfilmsofficial@gmail.com

We also post a lot on our instagram @twofoldfilmsofficial and you can dm us there as well.

I look forward to seeing everyone's auditions!

https://forms.gle/kUouZ3eddEpaj59w5

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CAMP RED LAKE CASTING CALL NOW CASTING AGES 14-99 Self-Tape Auditions Deadline: July 24, 2026 June, 1985. A group of lifelong friends return to the caTp they'v loved since childhood Until a masked figure turns their summer fun into a nightmare.'

May be an image of text that says 'CAMP RED LAKE HOW TO AUDITION Step One: Read through the character descriptions listed on the audition form and in our bio! Step Two: Find a monologue you like that best shows off your abilities! Step Three: Film a self-tape! Step four: Fill out the aud audition form found in our bio and submit your tape! Step five: Wait to hear from us! :)'

May be an image of text that says 'Cap mpRed Red Lake NoW Casting Teen Roles: Mikey Harris (16) rebellious teen fresh out of juvie who's stuck at caTp with an ankle monitor. Megan Murphy (18) A strict, competitive overachiever and our protagonist's longtime rival. Zachary Windham (18)-A (18) loyal and kind-hearted jock Tiffany Hill (17) bubbly, Bowie-loving girly girl Jay Barnes -A laid-back caTp counselor everyone likes Amanda Smith (18)- Zach's flirty ex-girlfriend who loves creating tension and drama. Andy Zimmerman (16) nerdy and shy magician •Courtney Barclay (17)- An outgoing and kind new girl who people often get the wrong impression of'
May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says 'Camp Red Lake Now casting: Extras! Want to join in on the CaTp Red Lake casting fun, but don't want to read lines? We got you! Fill out section 2 of our audition form for extras only!'

topComments.text: Is it ok to submit my acting reel vs monologue?

https://forms.gle/kUouZ3eddEpaj59w5
items.title: 🚨!!CASTING CALL!!🚨

items.text:
LOGLINE

A wannabe mobster uses an app to relive — and fix — a past betrayal. But after multiple glitches, he finds himself stuck on app support hold and turns to the dark web for a solution to his clone chaos.

APPS is currently in post-production, and we’re looking for a Sound Mixer to help support the film’s final audio and sound mix. 🎧

Toronto-based preferred. This role will be remote.

This is a self-funded debut project with limited resources. A small honorarium will be provided, and you will receive credit for your work.

If interested, please send a short introduction along with your reel, portfolio, or samples of your work to:
STUDIO2425FILMS@GMAIL.COM

Thank you so much!

items.text:
Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

1. Matylda Osińska (26) – typ „twardej babki”. 

Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Księgowa (28) – księgowa w firmie budowlanej; drobna, życzliwa.

Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3.Matka Amelii (34) – spokojna, opanowana, ale bardzo boi się o córkę. Ładna, subtelny makijaż i ubranie.

Data: 11. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto

4.Anka – Anna Sitowska (37) – żona ganstera, matka Klary. Zrobiona. Na początku związku była delikatna, przerażało ją to, czym zajmuje się mąż. Potem jednak się „zradykalizowała”. Potrafi być stanowcza i ostra, zwłaszcza, jeśli chodzi o jej rodzinę. Ubrana elegancko, w perły i drogi zegarek.

Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
WE ARE LOOKING FOR MEN AGED 50+ WITH OLIVE OR DARKER SKIN TONES
to play Afghan characters in a feature film

We are filming a war story set in Afghanistan and are looking for men aged 50 and over with olive or darker complexions. You do not have to be Afghan to apply.

No experience is required! Anyone can apply and see firsthand what working on a professional movie set looks like behind the scenes.

GOOD PAY RATES

We can also help with transportation if needed.

DATE & LOCATION: June 11, 2026 — Dąbrowa Górnicza, Poland

APPLICATIONS:

sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

Email subject: FILM AFGHANISTAN

Please include: First name, last name, age, city, phone number, and a photo.

—

‎ما به دنبال مردان ۵۰ ساله و بالاتر با پوست گندمی یا تیره هستیم تا نقش شخصیت‌های افغان را در یک فیلم سینمایی بازی کنند.

‎ما در حال ساخت فیلمی درباره جنگ افغانستان هستیم و به دنبال مردان ۵۰ ساله و بالاتر با پوست گندمی یا تیره می‌گردیم. برای ثبت‌نام لازم نیست افغان باشید.

‎هیچ تجربه‌ای لازم نیست! هر کسی می‌تواند ثبت‌نام کند و از نزدیک ببیند که کار در پشت صحنه یک فیلم حرفه‌ای چگونه است.

‎دستمزد مناسب و جذاب پرداخت می‌شود.

‎در صورت نیاز، برای رفت‌وآمد نیز کمک خواهیم کرد.

‎تاریخ و مکان: ۱۱ ژوئن ۲۰۲۶ — دابرووا گورنیچا، لهستان

‎ثبت‌نام: sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

‎عنوان ایمیل: FILM AFGHANISTAN

‎ ‎لطفاً این موارد را ارسال کنید: نام، نام خانوادگی، سن، شماره تلفن

items.text:
CASTING CALL — CHILD ACTRESS (ATLANTA, GA)
Independent Short Film: “Glass Crown: The Repast

Production is currently seeking a young actress to portray ATHENA, a key supporting role in an emotionally grounded dramatic short film.

ROLE:

ATHENA

Black female

Age Range: 6–10 years old

Athena is observant, intelligent, calm, and emotionally mature beyond her years. She carries a quiet presence and strong emotional depth.

FILMING LOCATION:

Atlanta, Georgia

PLEASE NOTE:

Applicants must be based in or able to work as a local hire in Atlanta, GA.

SHOOT DATES:

June 12–14, 2026

(Child actors will not be needed for all shoot days.)

COMPENSATION:

This is an unpaid independent short film project.

Meals will be provided on set.

IMDb credit and festival exposure included.

TO SUBMIT:

Please send:

• Headshot or recent photo

• Age

• Acting reel or self-tape (if available)

• Parent/guardian contact information

Send submissions to:

LadyOnyxx89@gmail.com 

Director:

Jessica Carter

“Glass Crown: The Repast”

items.text:
Come and join us tomorrow! Half-price class. 😊 (Only a £3 deposit required)

DM to book. 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

Really friendly, super to start and amazing community 18:33 Leylah Best way to start my week! items.text:
🐈‍⬛💰WEŹ UDZIAŁ W IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ
Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:

• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡

• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡

• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!

•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

•🎬Rywalizujesz tylko z osobami w studio, nie ma quizów, testów wiedzy, szanse większe niż w Lotto ! 

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:

• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.

• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL

Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ

W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.text: Sooooooo... First off, Hello! I'm Ian and came to Boulder for grad school. I've done music videos and short films with stopmotion and live-action. I have a screenplay that I wrote back home and am posting to gauge interest. It's bloody and contains nudity and humor and I have the hitchhiker from TCM's voice acting for a stopmotion satan. The rest is live action. With the network I've built so far I will be be able to get a pretty good sound track for free.  BUT... I can not pay! I'd be aiming for shooting principle photography next summer.

topComments.text: Depending on the days, distance and time commitment; I would enjoy contributing

items.text:
You are in for a grandma-granddaughter, human-organ-smuggling-to-Poland road trip of a lifetime. But in order to film it, we have to rent the car, pay the gran, buy food and, and, and… well, all of that requires money. And technology too.

We are a team of women creatives making **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")**, a darkly funny road-trip film set in the 1990s.

Sasha, a troubled woman tangled in organized crime, is tasked with smuggling a cooler of human organs from Ukraine to Poland. Her unpredictable grandmother unexpectedly joins the journey, turning the trip into something neither of them expects.

We're currently competing for funding through Decentralized Pictures and would love your support.

**How to help:**
1. Open Chrome on your laptop.
2. Visit: https://app.decentralized.pictures/.../6a11e333fde507ae32...
3. Find **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")** in the Filmmakers Assistance Grant.
4. Vote and leave a review.
5. Share with anyone who supports independent cinema.

If you're a filmmaker, Decentralized Pictures is also a great resource for discovering film funding opportunities.

[[https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)

sharedPost.text:
Kamed Studio 
30 maja (sobota)
Zbiórka około 10.00
Plan w Otwocku 

Na plan serialu współczesnego szukamy statystów w różnym wieku. Gramy pacjentów szpitala.

Szukamy przede wszystkim osób które samodzielnie dojadą na plan (dobre połączenie kolejką SKM)

Stawka 130 zl. płatne gotówką po planie 
Jeżeli ktoś wybiera się na plan samochodem i zabierze ze sobą kilka osób- dopłata do paliwa w wysokości 50 zl.

Zgłoszenia z aktualnym zdjęciem na nr SMS 
731 738 797

Kamed Studio Warszawa 
29 maja - piątek- to już JUTRO
Tylko osoby z Warszawy 

MINI EPIZOD 
Stawka 200 zl.

Do małego epizodu szukamy kobiety I mężczyzny w wieku 25 - 45 lat. Kobieta koniecznie blond włosy, obydwoje bez widocznych tatuaży 
Epizody bez tekstu. Plan od około 10.00 do około 15.00

Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o zgłoszenia zawierające 
- imię I nazwisko 
- wiek
- aktualne zdjęcie
- wizytówkę w postaci linku do YouTube 

na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

z dopiskiem w tytule EPIZOD

Hello there, everybody how are you all doing? My name is Sean McLean. I’m an actor a model and a musician.

I’ve been within this industry for almost a decade. I’ve worked all around the world with various different agencies as well as brands campaigns, feature films, Short films and commercials. I’ve walked in London Fashion week on multiple occasions.

I also make and compose music, I just recently had a film producer by one of my songs for their upcoming feature film. 

All of my extensive details are included here on my portfolio links and my Spotlight. 

IG: @seanhmclean

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM FROM UNKNOWN TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
It Seems Like You've Done Everything Right. So How Come Nothing Is Moving?

You trained. You got the headshots. You got the reel. Maybe you even got the agent.
And yet you are sitting here wondering why nothing is moving.

How are you supposed to break into Netflix-level work when nobody actually explains the strategy behind it?

I am Freya Tingley. I’m from Perth. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC's Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It was not.

What you are not being told is that most of the work happens before the audition room. The actors who book have
figured out how to engineer their own access. The ones who do not are still waiting to be discovered.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying things like:

"I have an agent but no auditions."
"I am auditioning but not booking."
"I do not know what I am doing wrong."

What if the problem is not your talent?

What if it is the strategy, or the lack of one?

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you are stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next.

I would rather you have clarity than spend another year guessing.

If you know you need to move, DM me "COMMIT" to apply for a session.

What would it cost you to keep doing what you have been doing?

items.text: Please share. Please share. All of the roles and information will be displayed at the audition. The location is in Oak Lawn Illinois. Just show up if you are interested in auditioning with us. We have 1 leading actress, 1 leading actor. 1 supporting actress and 1 supporting actor. Regular actors and extras needed. 1 teenager. Slate board and a A.D. Low budget film. Union actors messenger me. Non union actors are welcome. Nobody will ask you for money at this audition. The monologs will be given to you once you see on our board which actor you choose. Any other information you need, you can email us at dclaproduction@yahoo.com or wait until you come to the casting call on Friday. The name of the film is call The Consequence of His Choice. An LLC Film production licensed and insured under the state of Illinois.

items.text:
Hello everyone! 

Sharing information about the upcoming PRACTICE LAB by PROJEKT EUROPA in London - all workshops are led by wonderful international artists!

**10 June 2026 - 18:00-20:00**- Chisenhale Dance Space, 64-84 Chisenhale Road, London, E3 5QZ.

**Ensemble Theatre Making with Halfpace Theatre **led by** **Megan Brewer 

This session looks at ways of building an ensemble as a foundation for devised work and how to build a welcoming environment for your collective. We’ll go over co-creating codes of conduct, exercises and warm-ups to foster team understanding and trust; how to take a survey of ‘who is in the room’; and a few ways to devise using collective movement and elements such as sound and lighting.

PRACTICE LAB is a curated series of workshops by PROJEKT EUROPA led by international theatre makers, offered in partnership with Chisenhale Dance Space in London. These workshops are aimed at sharing the wealth of skills and knowledge in the migrant artist community and creating new and unexpected connections between theatre makers from all communities.

Participants are asked to make a small contribution, starting at £5, to help cover programme costs.

For more information and to book, visit: [[https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6MURtkiwi5u3I_SjuOeBAfY7AhWr_i_KdAjMyVqhVAnbPHXVMkLj0S_xAWqA_aem_37e7tl3N7fomzbiT0SDj9A&brid=YWdncwF3oE3PfCy7A0jt9rzAm-C7)]([https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.projekteuropa.org%2Flab%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wH2CMLT7rt0F69kpeSpbP2xb2LbM9OutspDRlsbYsF5bpy77HRxa7r96Lmw_aem_yFDP_eO7ruhhw9vumhF_VA%26brid%3DYWdncwFNOV3hP8jxUEkazqmV3Nih&h=AUBpqUPyU0dHXZTC59jShCXyR0QWcXJG99MbQSIbjO2i38w0UKCKLdUNkBJmWvchtIOHBojgs88hkA9Iza3xjfQcKl3_MHG90oS0yhWAmo4Yw7NHhbQFBzmy-_3-GC5gDK6hcgyyPlROyQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDmrSsYxuTJ93CtqBRxUqmGGyzMN-fumFjddGqenYoCv__WxU-R-rBxBLYUqkVWPEN-oJewkZ5Kg2_gSOJsp9rOvig5IxIXcdjqoRLJY8E3AoyiQpuq5gzN28QMaQQ9cq9-pr7jccDCk_HAPXrMnWqcMCRSWY3QIM6RCgN49Hvp))

Thank you!

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
Get your** EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT before May 31st**! 

**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

>> **Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** 
>> **Organic Breathing & Image Work**
>> **Kutiyattam Traditional Theatre** (Kerala, India) 
>> **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> **The Actor’s Energy and Presence** 
>> **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷, **Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳, **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰, **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: **Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳, **Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮, **Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮, **Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭** Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text: Joe TenBroek, David Versace, Michael Pickard, and I want to give a huge shout-out to all the amazing creatives, collaborators, artists and all-stars that created this amazing Concept Pilot! We couldn't fit everyone into the video, so I ask you to please take a moment to check out The Hook IMDb page, and give these people the congratulations they deserve! Take a bow! Not too shabby for ST Park Productions first project!

sharedPost.text:
We wanted to do something special for the extraordinary cast and crew that we had aboard. We hope you enjoy the footage.

We are so grateful for the expertise, love, and support from these fine individuals. There is no concept pilot without you. Seriously. From the bottom of our hearts: Thank You.

Some may not be pictured here, due to limited BTS, but every single person on this project was so critical to it's success. Rock on, everyone!

Don't get Addicted, Get Hooked!!!

items.summary: Joe TenBroek, David Versace, Michael Pickard, and I want to give a huge shout-out to all the amazing creatives, collaborators, artists and all-stars that created this amazing Concept Pilot! We couldn't fit everyone into the video, so I ask you to please take a moment to check out The Hook IMDb page, and give these people the congratulations they deserve! Take a bow! Not too shabby for ST Park Productions first project!

items.text:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

KarrideoTV ist dein deutschsprachiges Magazin für Persönlichkeitsentwicklung, Business, Gesellschaft und wahre Geschichten. Wir bringen dir journalistische Reportagen, Interviews, Expertenwissen, Dokumentationen und Mindset-Impulse – für Menschen, die mehr aus ihrem Leben machen wollen.

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

🎙️ KARRIDEO TV – Mindset • Business • Stories 

KarrideoTV ist dein deutschsprachiges Magazin für Persönlichkeitsentwicklung, Business, Gesellschaft und wahre Geschichten. Wir bringen dir journalistische Reportagen, Interviews, Expertenwissen, Dokumentationen und Mindset-Impulse – für Menschen, die mehr aus ihrem Leben machen wollen. 

🔔 KANAL ABONNIEREN & Glocke aktivieren: 

https://www.youtube.com/@KarrideoTV

▶ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@KarrideoTV

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – MA STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON)
Hi everyone!

We are a group of three MA Visual Effects students in London currently developing a short live-action + CGI film exploring the unseen emotional experiences of wheelchair users and the feelings of exclusion or isolation that can arise in everyday situations.

We are looking for a wheelchair user actor (or performer with lived experience) to play the lead role in our short film.

About the role:

* Lead role in a ~1-minute short film

* A quiet, emotional, visually driven performance

* The story follows a wheelchair user in a casual setting with friends while visualising their internal thoughts and invisible struggles through cinematic VFX metaphors.

Shoot details:

📍 London

📅 TBA (end of May / beginning of June)

💰 All expenses paid 

We are committed to approaching this story with care, authenticity, and respect, and would love to collaborate with someone who connects with the project and would be interested in helping shape the portrayal.

If interested (or if you know someone who may be!), please comment below or send me a DM. We’d be happy to share more details and the project deck/script.

Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Casting Call: Middle-Aged Female Actor (Short Film)
Hello!

I’m currently casting for a short film that follows a mother and daughter reuniting at the daughter’s flat after six months apart. It’s an intimate, fly-on-the-wall chamber drama, shot entirely inside a London flat on a very small budget.

**The role: **
* Mother (playing age 50–60)
*  Warm, complex, emotionally grounded character

I have already cast the daughter, who is Welsh, so a Welsh actor would be ideal for authenticity but this is not essential.

**Shoot dates: **TBC, likely late July.

**Shoot length: **1-2 days.

**Location:** Bow, London.

**Please note that this is an unpaid role, though travel/expenses can be covered where needed. It’s a strong character-driven piece and will be a great collaborative experience with a small team.**

If you’re interested or would like more details about the story/character, feel free to DM me.

Thanks so much!

items.text:
**WE’RE BACK! - THE PRICE IS RIGHT TONIGHT SEASON 2**

*The Price is Right Tonight *hosted by Howie Mandel is back for season 2! And we'd love to see you apply!! Join our studio audience for a chance to come on down and play for big wins, big prizes and big money!

**DATES:**

Filming takes place in Toronto from June 23rd to 30th, 2026, with three daily tapings at 12:30 pm, 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm. 

**APPLICATION DETAILS:**

You must apply as a group of at least 4 people (including yourself), with the option to apply with up to 10 people total. Groups can include friends, family, or colleagues!

Complete the application below and submit a photo for each group member.

**ELIGIBILITY:**

Each applicant must complete their own section, review, and agree to the rules at the end of the form.

To be eligible to compete:
* All applicants must be 19+ at the time of application
* All applicants must have the right to live and work in Canada
* All applicants must be available to film in Toronto between June 23 - 30, 2026

Below is the application link for the show. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to [Casting@priceproductionsinc.com](mailto:Casting@priceproductionsinc.com)

APPLY HERE NOW: [https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/](https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/)

🤍 **MODEL & ACTOR CASTING CALL** 💙

**Otwieramy rekrutację dla nowych twarzy!**
Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Nail Salon

Genre: Drama

Non-union, unpaid

Food, IMDb credit, and reel footage provided

Filming Location: Miami/Orlando FL areas

Filming Dates: November 2026

Character Descriptions:

SUPPORTING: Connor (M, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity): knight in shining armor. Natalie’s new love interest. Very respectful of women and will go tooth and nail for the people he loves.

SUPPORTING: Officer Quinn (F, or presenting, 30s to 50s, open ethnicity): kind and compassionate woman who always wants to do what’s right. Very respectful of her superiors even when not necessary.

SUPPORTING: Officer Zambrano (M, or presenting, 40s to 60s, open ethnicity): sleazy and generally incompetent. Is only a cop for the power and looks. Stereotypical victim blamer and misogynist.

SUPPORTING: Ingrid (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity, disabled actress preferred): Grace’s new roommate and friend. Caring and calm. Due to her disability is extremely empathetic to the people around her. 

DAY PLAYER: Sara (F, or presenting, 60s+, white): Warren’s mother. Overbearing and strict. Only cares about herself.

DAY PLAYER: 911 Operator (open gender, open age, open ethnicity): typical 911 operator. VOICE OVER ONLY NOT REQUIRED ON SET.

DAY PLAYER: Hillary (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity): Blake’s new girlfriend. As dramatic as he is. Juliet to his Romeo. In his face all along and finally got him to see her.

DAY PLAYER: Dr. Olivier (F, or presenting, 50s to 60s, open ethnicity): Blake and Hillary’s drama teacher. Prim and polished. Never likes anything out of place and cares more about her program than anything else.

*Do not share without my expressed permission*
*Only accepting submissions via email*
*Must be able to work as a local. No room and board or travel compensation*

PLEASE NOTE: If auditioning for Ingrid, please include in email if you are disabled and what disability you have if comfortable sharing. 

TO SUBMIT: We are accepting submissions until June 14th. Please send an email to skywardproductions3@gmail.com with CC to willb.musiq@gmail.com with reel or resume and a headshot. We look forward to hearing from you!

SUPPORTING: Officer Zambrano (M, or presenting, 40s to 60s, open ethnicity): sleazy and generally incompetent. Is only a cop for the power and looks. Stereotypical victim blamer and misogynist.

SUPPORTING: Ingrid (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity, disabled actress preferred): Grace’s new roommate and friend. Caring and calm. Due to her disability is extremely empathetic to the people around her. 

DAY PLAYER: Sara (F, or presenting, 60s+, white): Warren’s mother. Overbearing and strict. Only cares about herself.

DAY PLAYER: 911 Operator (open gender, open age, open ethnicity): typical 911 operator. VOICE OVER ONLY NOT REQUIRED ON SET.

DAY PLAYER: Hillary (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity): Blake’s new girlfriend. As dramatic as he is. Juliet to his Romeo. In his face all along and finally got him to see her.

DAY PLAYER: Dr. Olivier (F, or presenting, 50s to 60s, open ethnicity): Blake and Hillary’s drama teacher. Prim and polished. Never likes anything out of place and cares more about her program than anything else.

*Do not share without my expressed permission*
*Only accepting submissions via email*
*Must be able to work as a local. No room and board or travel compensation*

PLEASE NOTE: If auditioning for Ingrid, please include in email if you are disabled and what disability you have if comfortable sharing. 

TO SUBMIT: We are accepting submissions until June 14th. Please send an email to skywardproductions3@gmail.com with CC to willb.musiq@gmail.com with reel or resume and a headshot. We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
ISO BG actors for 2h on 5/31

Hello, I’m looking for background actors for my short film You’re Not Well. We are shooting in Brooklyn (Bedstuy) this weekend and I need BG actors to play a live audience from a podcast and laugh at our main character. We will get close up shots of your reactions!

We will need you for 2h around from around 3-m to 5 pm.

This is a passion project so unfortunately it is unpaid but we will of course get that footage to you for your reel.

If interested you can email me at nievesgarciaperchin@gmail.com

Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
**CASTING CALL**

**Background/Extras for a charity film:**

1 x Family (2 Adults, 1-3 Kids, Any genders)
11th June
Approx 2 hours

Location TBD (within the Liverpool area)

Travel must be handled independently 

**£200 all inclusive**

We are shooting a mini documentary for a children's charity in Liverpool and need a family playing in the background of some footage. Many thanks for any interest!

items.text:
Music Video Casting
Hello

I am currently casting for a music video production shooting in Liverpool on June 6th and looking for local people.   I have attached the casting call in the event you may want to express and interest.   

Particularly interested in hearing from.

PUBLIC SERVICE AND HEALTHCARE WORKERS

PEOPLE FROM DIFFERENT SUBCULTURES

PEOPLE WITH UNIQUE INTERESTS

PEOPLE 70+

Thank you

Casey

items.text:
Hello everyone,

My name is Ibrahim, and I am a professional Fire Performer. I am currently looking for work opportunities in any country.

I have several years of experience performing fire shows and am available for contracts, events, resorts, festivals, and entertainment programs.

If you have any opportunities or need a fire performer, please feel free to contact me.

You can also check my work and performances on my Instagram page:
@leader_of_the_dragondubai 

Thank you.
